The Artist

Aditi Kashyap

I paint because some feelings are too heavy for words and too honest for silence. My work moves between the playful and the profound — from a Dalmatian draped in attitude to the quiet violence of a mask bleeding emotion. Each piece is finished, framed, and ready to bring something real into your space.
